name: database-poller
description: Polls relational databases for new or updated rows using a cursor column. Supports PostgreSQL, SQL Server, and MySQL with watermark-based incremental reads.
author: hermes-core

connection_string.title: Connection String
connection_string.description: Full ADO.NET connection string for the target database

provider.title: Database Provider
provider.description: Relational database provider to connect to

pool_min_size.title: Connection Pool Minimum Size
pool_min_size.description: Minimum number of idle connections maintained in the pool

pool_max_size.title: Connection Pool Maximum Size
pool_max_size.description: Maximum number of concurrent connections allowed in the pool

command_timeout_seconds.title: Command Timeout (seconds)
command_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for a query to complete

poll_interval.title: Poll Interval
poll_interval.description: Duration between polling cycles in Go-style duration syntax (e.g. 30s, 5m, 1h)

retry_max_attempts.title: Retry Max Attempts
retry_max_attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts on transient database errors

retry_delay_seconds.title: Retry Delay (seconds)
retry_delay_seconds.description: Initial delay in seconds between retry attempts (exponential backoff applied)

table_name.title: Table Name
table_name.description: Name of the table to poll (schema-qualified if needed, e.g. dbo.orders)

query.title: Custom SQL Query
query.description: Optional custom SELECT statement; use :watermark placeholder for cursor injection. Overrides table_name if set.

cursor_column.title: Cursor Column
cursor_column.description: Column used to track polling progress (e.g. updated_at or id)

cursor_type.title: Cursor Type
cursor_type.description: Data type semantics of the cursor column

watermark_offset.title: Watermark Offset
watermark_offset.description: Offset subtracted from the latest cursor value to handle late-arriving rows (e.g. 5s, 1m)

filter_predicate.title: Filter Predicate
filter_predicate.description: Additional SQL WHERE clause fragment appended to the generated query (e.g. status = 'ACTIVE')

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of rows fetched per poll cycle

column_mapping.title: Column Mapping
column_mapping.description: Rename or alias columns in the output record (key: source column, value: output field name)
